title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
